english:
This short bow will not display an emblem if you are not representing this guild.
Double-click to imbue another short bow's stats into this appearance (one-time ability).
This sign declares the area a protected cat reserve.
This small access card has a series of numbers and letters along one edge.
This soot-covered ring appears to be humming with magic.

This speargun will not display emblem if you are not representing this guild.
Double-click to imbue another speargun's stats into this appearance (one-time ability).

This staff will not display emblem if you are not representing this guild.
Double-click to imbue another staff's stats into this appearance (one-time ability).
This statuette has a faint herbal scent.
This statuette has the head of a horned lion and the tail of a fish. It's like nothing you've ever seen in Tyria.
This statuette is exquisitely carved from pure jade, as if part of an imperial art collection.
This statuette is in pristine condition. Surely it was carved very recently.
This still-intact power core has a crystal input socket at one end.

This stone is attuned to ley-line energy. Carrying it will indicate when a Ley-Line Anomaly appears.
Double-click to get a reading.
This stone shimmers like translucent gold and teleports you back to the egg chamber in Tarir.

This strange asuran device provides permanent access to the Mistlock Sanctuary, a place that exists simultaneously in both Tyria and the Mists.
• Quick Travel to All Cities
• Fractals of the Mists Entrance
• Crafting Stations
• Bank and Guild-Bank Access
• Mystic Forge
• Merchants
• And more! All within easy reach, for those who enjoy the ultimate convenience.

This strange asuran device provides temporary access to the Mistlock Sanctuary.
• Quick Travel to All Cities
• Fractals of the Mists Entrance
• Crafting Stations
• Bank and Guild-Bank Access
• Mystic Forge
• Merchants
• And more! All within easy reach, for those who enjoy the ultimate convenience.

This strange mist-wreathed box contains valuable loot.
Double-click to open.
This strange rock appears to be humming with magic.

This strange, mist-wreathed box contains valuable loot. It will require a Mist-Hardened Lockbox Key to open.

Mist-Hardened Lockbox Keys can be purchased from Dugan in WvW maps.
This sturdy sword belt has notches carved into its leather to track kills. A refugee in the Black Citadel might want it back.
This Super Adventure augmentation was created by the asuran musician Duskk after a long session of Tribulation Mode in Moto's Super Adventure Box. Caution: May overload near Tribulation Clouds!
This tablet contains a partial history of people and events in ancient Demetra. Take it to the Durmand Priory Explorer to gain renown in the area.
This tapestry shred is old and wet, but it resembles the type Valeria told you to look for.
This thank-you note from Tasa and Aksim came with a pair of ornate, well-made riding gloves. It also suggests speaking with the priestess at the Marifa refugee camp outside of Amnoon.
This token signifies an assassination you performed.
This tool will remove the infusions from any item without destroying either the infusion or the item. Can be purchased from a vendor inside the Fractals of the Mists.
This tool will remove the upgrades from any item, without destroying either the upgrade or the item.
This tough sinew can be turned into thread by Seamstress Aina.
This unusual material can be used in the Mystic Forge to craft Riftstalker weaponry.
This veteran container has a champion bag.

This vial of goo smells awful.
<c=@flavor>When you hold it, you get a tingling feeling that reminds you of the Mystic Forge.</c>

This volume teaches you how to perform the "Dodge Step," "Inventory Shuffle," and "Gear Grind" dance moves. You also gain the ability to invite others to follow along in a dance you control.

Double-click to receive these dance skills and the Dancing Spirit buff.
This was given to you by Noran for helping him around his homestead. It can be used to open a secret chest deep below the homestead once a day. Opening the chest consumes the key.

This water is warm and murky. It could be purified, but only at its source.
Double-click to show.
This weapon box contains unique weapon skins, dragonite ore, empyreal fragments, obsidian shards, and mystic clovers.
This weathered logbook details the endeavors and demise of an Iron Legion warband. A refugee in the Black Citadel might want it back.
This will change the appearance of your mount and unlock this mount skin for all characters on your account. Mounts must be unlocked before mount skins can be applied.
This will replace the appearance of any back item and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe.This backpack skin has no stats of its own.

This will replace the appearance of any helm of any weight class and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe. 

This helm skin has no stats of its own.

This will replace the appearance of one back item of any weight class and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe.
<c=@flavor>The Ascalon Vanguard fought and died with honor defending their people.</c>

This back item skin has no stats of its own.

This will replace the appearance of one back slot item of any weight class and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe.

This back slot skin has no stats of its own.
This will replace the appearance of one back-slot item of any weight class and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe.

This will replace the appearance of one back-slot item of any weight class and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe.
<c=@flavor>No rams were harmed in the making of this backpack.</c>

This will replace the appearance of one longbow and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe.

This longbow skin has no stats of its own.

This will replace the appearance of one shoulder armor of any weight class and unlock the skin in your account wardrobe.

This shoulder skin has no stats of its own.
This will unlock the glider skin in your account wardrobe.
This will unlock the jade bot skin in your account wardrobe.
This wood is very wet. One could even say waterlogged.
This wooden toy, crafted to resemble Toymaker Tixx's Wintersday soldiers, looks well-loved. A refugee in the Black Citadel might want it back.

This worn book is covered in notes and drawings.
Double-click to access your tiger den.
This would be a pretty cool toy if it was your size.
This would be great for posing a stuffed animal. This item has no value outside of its collection.
Threat: The Terror of the Sands

Through your effort to show your Angry Wintersday Gift why it's covered in bows and ribbons, it now has the real Wintersday spirit. Inside the gift was this bag, which it gave to you as thanks for helping others.

When you shake the bag, it sounds like it might have a glider skin in it.

Double-click to open.
Throw a bottle of balm to transform ambient creatures into candy corn elementals.
Throw the skyscale a magically infused fish to devour.
Tiara of the Temple Guard of the Cavalier
Tiny love that warms you like the morning sun.

Tips and tricks for training your tiger, by Cymbel.
Double-click to access your tiger den.
Title Scroll: Prodigy of Shing Jea
Title: Baron and Baroness of the Arena
Title: Demigod and Demigoddess of the Arena
Title: Duke and Duchess of the Arena
Title: God and Goddess of the Arena
Title: King and Queen of the Arena
Title: Knight and Dame of the Arena
Title: Prince and Princess of the Arena
To learn answers of the obscure, one must ask a thousand questions. Search the halls of a place where you may seek those answers. Or, perhaps, even more questions.
Token of the Celestial Champion Fragment
Token of the Dragon Ball Champion
Tomb of the Primeval Kings Fragment
Tools to aid in the hunt.
Top Half of the Mistwrought Key
